head.title: Agriturismo Segarelli | Contacts
head.description: Contact Agriturismo Segarelli for bookings, information, and directions. Plan your relaxing stay in the Tuscan countryside.

contatti.title: How to reach us and contact us

accordion.title: For those arriving from the sea
accordion.text: Take Cecina exit and continue on the SS 68 in the direction of Volterra for about 30 km – In the town of Volterra, at the junction turn right, cross the railway and continue towards Pomarance for about 10 km – Cross the town of Pomarance and continue for about 5 km direction Larderello – 300 m before the Montecerboli sign turn right and follow the signs to the agritourism an uphill road for about 1 km – Always keeping on the main road you arrive at the farm Segarelli.

accordion.title: Coming from A1
accordion.text: In Florence North exit the highway and take the freeway Fi-Pi-Li, direction Pisa – Exit at Pontedera and continue towards Volterra – At Saline di Volterra, in the town center turn left, cross the railway and continue towards Pomarance for about 10 km – Across the town of Pomarance continuing for about 5 km direction Larderello – 300 m before the Montecerboli sign turn right and follow the signs to the agritourism an uphill road for about 1 km – Always keeping on the main road you arrive at the farm Segarelli.

slides.title: Sleep
slides.text: Spacious, quiet, and welcoming spaces. Three apartments, some connected, so you can truly feel at home: Acacia, Edera, and Gelsomino.

slides.title: Eat
slides.text: An authentic, natural, and unpretentious experience.

slides.title: Play
slides.text: Walk, explore, relax: every corner has its surprises.

slides.title: Discover
slides.text: Explore medieval villages and enjoy local events.
